explanation: TRUE POSITIVE. const::fee = 0.05 TON is mathematically insufficient to complete the full claim chain. At minimum balance (0.10 TON), airdrop_helper sends ~0.045 TON to airdrop after external message gas costs; airdrop then forwards the remainder to its jetton_wallet via mode 64. The jetton_wallet's send_tokens function requires msg_value > fwd_ton_amount(0.01) + 2×fwd_fee + 2×gas_consumption(0.015) + min_tons_for_storage(0.01) > 0.050 TON, but receives only ~0.040–0.045 TON. throw_unless(709) fires unconditionally at minimum balance. The resulting bounce goes from jetton_wallet to airdrop, but airdrop.fc has no bounce handler — it falls to else { throw(0xffff); }. Since bounced messages are non-bounceable in TON, no further bounce propagates to airdrop_helper. The claimed flag set before the send in recv_external is never cleared by recv_internal, permanently locking the user's airdrop entitlement.
